SaaS Detective Options

Control detections by category.

License Key

Free plan detects 50 signatures. Pro and above unlocks all 200+ signatures across 25+ categories.

Don't have a key? Choose a plan: $7.99/mo · $19.99/3mo · $34.99/6mo · $59.99/yr

Enabled Categories

Toggle categories to show/hide them in detection results. Changes are saved automatically and take effect on the next scan.
